Provide backup execution logs confirming user-level data is backed up daily (incremental) and weekly (full) with at least three copies maintained — at least one available online — per FedRAMP requirements. Include a description of how backup responsibilities are divided between the CSP and any underlying infrastructure provider. If backups are managed by the provider, include evidence the provider's CRM was reviewed and tested for this control.

Provide access revocation records confirming system access is disabled upon employee termination within the timeframe required by the applicable framework. Include ticket records, access revocation logs, and timestamps confirming the required revocation window was met for terminations occurring during the review period.

auditor_request.request_text: Provide the system configuration confirming non-privileged accounts require explicit authorization for security functions — including establishing accounts, configuring permissions, setting security parameters, and installing software — with no undocumented non-privileged access to these functions.

Provide the system configuration confirming non-privileged accounts are technically blocked from executing privileged functions — with role or permission configuration evidence showing the enforcement mechanism is active.
Provide configuration management records confirming physical and logical access restrictions associated with changes to the system are defined, documented, approved and enforced.

auditor_request.request_text: Provide the remote access authorization records confirming: (1) execution of privileged commands via remote access is permitted only for defined operational needs, with justification documented and assessable evidence maintained; and (2) access to security-relevant information via remote access is authorized only for defined needs with justification and assessable evidence — with both the authorization records and the technical controls enforcing these restrictions available.

Provide the audit configuration confirming only designated personnel or roles are authorized to select and modify the event types logged by specific system components, with access controls restricting that capability to approved individuals.
Provide the automated change access restriction configuration confirming only authorized personnel can implement configuration changes, with enforcement evidence.
Provide the production environment access configuration confirming privileges to change system components and related information are limited to authorized personnel.

auditor_request.request_text: Provide records confirming that when individuals are reassigned or transferred to other positions, the ongoing operational need for their current logical and physical access authorizations to systems and facilities is reviewed and confirmed — with transfer records showing access was evaluated, adjusted, or terminated as appropriate.
Provide transfer records confirming access was reviewed and updated to reflect the new role and any unnecessary access was removed.

auditor_request.request_text: Provide system configuration and access records confirming system authenticators are managed to ensure that authenticators have sufficient strength of mechanism for their intended use.

Provide the production environment access configuration confirming privileges to change system components and related information are limited to authorized personnel.

Provide privilege review records confirming that production and operational environment privileges are reviewed and reevaluated at least quarterly per FedRAMP requirements, with each review documenting the date, reviewer identity, and any privilege changes resulting from the evaluation.
Provide transfer records confirming access was reviewed and updated to reflect the new role and any unnecessary access was removed.

Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations

auditor_request.request_text: Provide audit log records confirming the event types selected for logging are reviewed and updated.

Provide system configuration records confirming the baseline configuration is reviewed and updated: at least annually and whenever a significant change occurs; when required due to defined circumstances; and when system components are installed or upgraded — with the review date, triggering condition, and any resulting changes documented for each update.

Provide records confirming any deviations from the established configuration baseline are identified, documented, and formally approved based on operational requirements, with each deviation including a justification and authorizing official sign-off.

Provide configuration management records confirming: (1) the system is reviewed at least annually to identify unnecessary or non-secure functions, ports, protocols, software, and services — with the review date, scope, and findings documented; and (2) all items identified as unnecessary or non-secure are disabled, removed, or restricted — with configuration evidence confirming hardening actions were implemented.

Provide firewall or network traffic flow policy review records confirming reviews are conducted at a frequency consistent with the applicable framework's requirements, or whenever there is a change in the threat environment that warrants a review. Include the review date, scope, findings, and documentation of any resulting rule set changes.

Provide the integrity verification configuration and records confirming software and firmware integrity checks are performed at least monthly and upon security-relevant events — such as system updates, configuration changes, or detected anomalies — with check results and any findings from the current period available.
Provide the integrity violation response configuration and records confirming defined actions are taken when unauthorized changes to software, firmware, or information are detected.

identity.description: Recorder Name, Role ARN, All Supported, Include Global Resources, Recording, Last Status, Last Status Change

classes.class: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations

auditor_request.request_text: Provide software usage compliance records confirming all three dimensions of software usage control are enforced: (1) software and associated documentation are used in accordance with contract agreements and applicable copyright laws — with license compliance records or legal review evidence; (2) the number of software copies in active use is monitored against licensed quantities to prevent unauthorized copying or distribution — with current license inventory and usage tracking records; and (3) peer-to-peer file sharing technologies are controlled and not used for unauthorized distribution of copyrighted material — with the P2P prohibition or control configuration confirming enforcement.
